title: Another solid run – +4,618 points on the latest trade
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
Like some of the results I’ve shared before, my model just closed another trade in profit. This time it was a **long position opened between the 26/09/2025 close and closed on 30/09/2025**, capturing **+4,618 points**.

For context, this isn’t a one-off; the system has been running on live data for years. Over the past three years it’s outperformed BTC spot and hasn’t closed a single quarter in loss. On average it has produced **\~5,000–5,500 points per month**, but of course not every trade is a big winner like this one.

So far this month we’re up **14,902 points while BTC is only up about 5,798 points**. I’m transparent about the numbers and results, and I’m currently allowing really interested user to have a trial of my model signals.

If you’re curious, feel free to ask questions publicly or message me for details about how it works in practice.

https://preview.redd.it/yut4438hhfsf1.png?width=1800&format=png&auto=webp&s=d9cc5cec9bcad27bf8183dfc4253b9eb7c13fb22

comments.author: kalle103
comments.body: How does it work in practice?

comments.author: pep_tounge
comments.body: are those results from live trades or backtests? Also curious what the drawdowns look like when BTC chops sideways.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: Tell me which date range trades data you want to see.

comments.author: WarmDogFace
comments.body: So, using your wizard magic, how do I go about the money out of my phone?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: can you please interpret sir, I did not understand!

comments.author: Brilliant-Factor9416
comments.body: It's easy to say you have something and have every gullible person believe you. Ppl need to see it happen for themselves. Im not trash talking you or your product. It's just too many ppl have been burned before with false hope of making money then having that person run off with hundreds or thousands of ppls hard earned money.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
I am legitimately helping people with the profitable strategy I have and I trade on my own...   
You can also have a trial if you want before actually subscribing to it.

No people can provide a trial until profitability hits for the person.

comments.author: Malcolm128
comments.body: How do I trial your system?

comments.author: AbhizzzUchiha
comments.body: Can I demo the system and how much is the price to buy it ?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: Yes sir ofcourse... DM me and let's discuss.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: Yes sir aboslutely, DM me if you are really interested...

comments.author: murkBoyCoughDrop
comments.body: I’m calling bullshit, your reddit page is the same spammed post reworded and this has all the characteristics of a great scam. So you’re saying you’re making all this money and yet out of the kindness of your heart you’d like to spread this wealth at the expense of other peoples funds? Yeah I’ll buy 10 more Nvidia shares over that any day no thank you.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
Did I say I have been running it live for years? NO...  
Did I cherry picked it? NO.    You can see this is the next signal of the previous one (you can see from my account).  
Do I want trial users? YES, and then paid because I have made a strategy that is very much profitable and trading alongside my own capital I am lending it to earn side income.  
Am I talking without data? ABSOLUTELY NOT.  [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yZGuFUf8XecgE2kel1zahbt6JrvzUeBR5LrxyOvYOyg/edit?usp=drive\_link](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yZGuFUf8XecgE2kel1zahbt6JrvzUeBR5LrxyOvYOyg/edit?usp=drive_link)  
Am I editing screeshots? ABSOLUTELY NOT..... You can see the performance from the model report I gave you.

  
So instead of using chatbot for replies study what I am providing and how I am able to make this strategy......  
I am also telling you to try it if you think I am scamming with false signals like other.
